revenue_map_metadata.annual_revenue_potential_at_scale: $2.4M ARR (100 Enterprise) + $480K ARR (20 MSSP) + $240K ARR (400 Pro)

feature_revenue_matrix.description: 1003+ STIX bundles with threat advisories, CVE intelligence, actor profiles
feature_revenue_matrix.free: Preview only — latest 10 advisories, no IOCs
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full feed + historical archive + custom filters
feature_revenue_matrix.oem: White-label feed delivery with custom branding
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Core value driver. Anchor all tier upgrades to this feature.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Extracted, validated, deduplicated IOC records with provenance
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Unlimited IOC lookups + bulk export + TAXII feed
feature_revenue_matrix.oem: Custom IOC API with your branding
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Must populate data/ioc/ first. High customer willingness to pay.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Enriched IOC context with external intelligence sources
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full enrichment stack (EPSS + VirusTotal + Shodan)
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Pro add-on opportunity. Charge per enrichment call above threshold.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: ATT&CK-tagged, analyst-tuned Sigma rules ready for SIEM deployment
feature_revenue_matrix.professional: Full Sigma library (210+ rules) monthly updates
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full library + custom rule generation + validation reports
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Detection packs have highest perceived value. Add behavioral rules to maximize credibility.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Malware family YARA rules with ATT&CK tags
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full YARA + custom generation + validation
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Bundle with Sigma as 'Detection Pack' to increase ARPU.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Ready-to-deploy KQL analytics rules for Microsoft Sentinel
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full KQL library + Sentinel deployment packages
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Highest demand in enterprise market. Must generate rules before listing as available.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Splunk search queries and correlation rules with ATT&CK mapping
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full SPL library + Splunk app packaging
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Bundle with KQL as 'SIEM Detection Pack' — premium add-on.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Visual ATT&CK coverage showing protected vs. gap techniques
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Interactive heatmap + gap analysis + coverage reports
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Used in QBRs. High executive visibility.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Observed adversary technique sequences and kill-chain reconstruction
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full attack sequence analysis + timeline replay
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Unique differentiator. No hash IOC competitor offers kill-chain reconstruction.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: IOC, adversary, infrastructure, and campaign relationship graph
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full graph with pivot, actor lineage, campaign chains
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: High demo value. Fix edge generation (0 edges) before pricing this feature.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Full-cycle investigation from alert to case close with timeline
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Up to 20 analyst seats + case management + playbooks
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Per-seat model increases ARPU as SOC teams grow.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Pre-built and custom response playbooks with automation hooks
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: 20 pre-built playbooks + custom builder
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Automation reduces analyst time — strong ROI justification for enterprise pricing.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Pre-built hunt hypotheses, queries, and detection logic
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Unlimited hunt packages + custom hunt builder
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Bundle with detection rules as 'Threat Hunt + Detect' package.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: AI governance, prompt risk monitoring, AI threat intelligence
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: AI governance dashboard + prompt risk analysis
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Flag runtime telemetry as roadmap. Sell AI-assisted CTI now. Build AI security later.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Audit trails, evidence lineage, confidence methodology, deployment lineage
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full Trust Center access
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Required for enterprise compliance. Low marginal cost, high compliance value.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Full platform API access with JWT auth, rate limiting, tier enforcement
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: 2000 req/min, all endpoints including STIX and detection
feature_revenue_matrix.oem: Unlimited, full API plus white-label headers
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Base tier price. All other features are included or add-ons.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Standards-compliant threat intelligence sharing via STIX/TAXII
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: STIX + TAXII 2.1 server
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Add-on to Enterprise. Many SIEM platforms have native TAXII connectors.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Real-time threat intelligence push to SIEM/SOAR via webhooks
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Up to 10 webhook endpoints
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Low friction integration accelerator. High perceived value.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Tenant isolation, per-client dashboards, analytics, and reporting
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: None
feature_revenue_matrix.mssp: Full multi-tenant platform — up to 50 tenants
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Highest value tier. Each MSSP customer brings 10-50 sub-customers.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Customer-branded threat intelligence reports
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Sentinel APEX branded reports
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Add-on. MSSPs will pay premium for white-label reports to re-sell to clients.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Predictive intelligence on emerging threats and exploit probability
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Full predictions + confidence scoring + export
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Strong marketing value. AI-powered = premium positioning.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Automated weekly threat intelligence briefings with executive summary
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Weekly briefing + custom sectors + Slack/Teams push
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: High retention feature. Customers who receive weekly briefings churn 40% less.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Named CSM for onboarding, QBRs, and platform adoption
feature_revenue_matrix.enterprise: Shared CSM
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Included in tier price. Key to reducing churn at Enterprise+.

feature_revenue_matrix.description: Contractual SLA with financial penalties for downtime
feature_revenue_matrix.notes: Included in tier. Required for Fortune 500 procurement approval.

key_revenue_levers: Fix ATT&CK coverage (32→75) — increases Enterprise close rate by ~30%
Fix graph edges — unlocks Graph Intelligence as $120/mo Enterprise add-on
KQL/SPL detection rules — required for Sentinel/Splunk enterprise penetration
MSSP tenant provisioning — each MSSP customer is worth 10x Enterprise ARR
OEM partnership — single OEM deal can equal 50+ Enterprise contracts
